The scores on a 110-point test were organized in the stem-and-leaf plot shown. $9|6$ represents 96 points. What is the mode of the scores?

\begin{array}{c|cccccc}
\multicolumn{7}{c}{\text{Points on the Test}} \\
5 & 0 & 0 \\
6 & 3 \\
7 & 7 & 8 \\
8 & 2 & 6 & 7 & 9 & 9 & 9 & 9 \\
9 & 1 & 4 & 4 & 4 & 6 \\
10 & 0 & 0 & 0
\end{array}
